v0.0.1.description:
**New Super Mario Bros Wii 0.0.1 Alpha Playtest release**
- OBS is not stable, not recommended to play with friends. Make savestates often and use \save in client to backup your clientsave, can restore with \load. This is just for the games internal memory when temporarily replacing savefile data.
- OBS currently does not place you in your randomized starter world so manually move with the worldmap once you in game to play in logic.
- This playtest is for dedicated community members who want to help find bugs. It is built on the new rule builder which is not yet released as of now so you will need to compile the main repo from source (until the next RC is released).
- The randomizer currently only supports US rev 2 version and playing on savefile 2 but hopefully will be able to add support to different versions down the line.
- OBS currently does not place you in your randomized starter world so manually move with the worldmap once you in game to play in logic.
- If game bug, try \reapply_checks or restart client. Some features say they are implemented but currently doesn't work, will fix in the future. (Deathlink, HUD messages, ISO patch and some move items).
- The client has a built-in tracker which I recommend using. To get it to work place the tracker.apworld in your worlds folder and open the client. https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases?q=Tracker.

TLDR
- Read the documentation to set it up (just download and double-click the nsmbw.apworld). https://github.com/Miiroun/Archipelago-NewSuperMarioBrosWii/tree/main/worlds/nsmbw/docs
- Check it out at https://github.com/Miiroun/Archipelago-NewSuperMarioBrosWii/releases (needs updated core).
v0.0.1.title: v0.0.1 Alpha Playtest

v0.0.2.description:
# Features
* Options (Added but not all combinations tested, report if something is problematic)
* Improved level connection logic
* Power-ups are now progressive
* Deathlink works but is buggy ( sends check when in pipes)


# Bugs Fixed
* Did not open in 0.6.7-rc1
* Spelling in docs
* Did not send completion check
* Death on main menu
* Not properly goaling
v0.0.2.title: v0.0.2 Playtest
